blog.title: Blog
blog.sub: Connect with Lightning to publish — everyone sees the live feed.
blog.needAuth: Connect with your Lightning wallet to publish.
blog.empty: No messages yet. Be the first!

game.title: Team Game
game.sub: Connect with Lightning and score a point for your team. One point per person — the goal is to practice a real LNURL-auth connection!
game.needAuth: Connect with your Lightning wallet to score your point.

tip.no_extension: No Lightning extension detected. Pay directly to this address:

landing.ticker: Bitcoin • Financial Sovereignty • No KYC • Open Source • Self-custody • LNURL-auth • Zero Server Data •
landing.sub: Real-time mempool fees, UTXO visualization and DCA tracking — no account, no server, authenticated by your Lightning wallet.
landing.features_sub: Built for sovereign Bitcoiners. Everything you need, nothing superfluous.
landing.feat2_desc: Enter your xpub — visualize your UTXOs as proportional bubbles. Automatic consolidation advice.
landing.feat_blog_desc: Connect with Lightning to publish — everyone sees the live feed, no account or email needed.
landing.feat_game_desc: Pick a team, connect with Lightning, score a point. Great for practicing LNURL-auth as a group.
landing.feat4_desc: Overview: current fees, stack value, UTXOs and P&L at a glance.
landing.feat5_desc: Installable on mobile. Works offline for local data. Fee notifications.
landing.feat6_desc: Authentication via Lightning cryptographic signature. No password, no email.
landing.step1_desc: Click 'Connect with Lightning' — scan the QR with Phoenix, Zeus, Alby or Breez.
landing.step2_desc: Your wallet signs an LNURL-auth challenge with your Lightning key. No sats spent.
landing.step3_desc: UTXOs and DCA stored in IndexedDB on your device. The server only sees the signature.
landing.priv_title: Your data never leaves your device.
landing.priv_sub: No database. No tracking. The server issues a JWT then forgets everything. Your DCA purchases and xpub stay in IndexedDB on your browser.
landing.priv_2: Xpub → mempool.space directly from the browser
landing.cta_sub: No account, no KYC, no server data.

utxos.title: 🔗 UTXO Visualizer
utxos.sub: Visualize and analyze your Bitcoin UTXOs from your xpub

utxo.label: Unspent Transaction Output
utxo.desc: An unspent Bitcoin 'coin' in your wallet. Multiple UTXOs = multiple separate deposits.

xpub.label: Extended Public Key
xpub.desc: Master public key of your HD wallet. Lets you see all your addresses without exposing your private key.

consolidation.label: UTXO Consolidation
consolidation.desc: Merge multiple small UTXOs into one. Useful when fees are low.

lnurl.label: Lightning URL Auth
lnurl.desc: Auth protocol via Lightning. Your wallet signs a cryptographic challenge — no sats spent.

jwt.label: JSON Web Token
jwt.desc: Authentication token signed by the server. Stored locally, valid for 30 days.
